configurations.name: Netlify Dev
configurations.description: Full Netlify environment: serves public/ AND runs serverless functions (/.netlify/functions/*) locally. Required to test PayPal create-payment and verify-payment endpoints.

configurations.name: live-server (frontend only)
configurations.description: Serves public/ with live-reload on save. No function support — PayPal buttons will fail. Good for layout and CSS work.

configurations.name: Python HTTP (frontend only)
configurations.description: Minimal static file server for public/. No live-reload, no functions. Useful as a zero-dependency fallback.
